creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Oops meant to include more detail there, but hit enter and that submitted the bug... Anyway, the issue is that bugzilla sends far more email than it seems it really needs to.

Yesterday I received 14 emails as a result of a user updating bug 184592. Granted 1/2 of those were because I was subscribed to the bug and to the ruby@ list which was also subscribed to the bug, but even so, 7 emails seems like more than was needed.

Perhaps it would have helped in this particular case if bugzilla didn't send an email when the user changed the mime type of an attachment, which seemed to happen several times. I am not sure why the user did that, perhaps it wasn't displaying the way he wanted in the browser.
